name: icmarkets-scalping-bot
description: Forex scalping bot — IC Markets cTrader Open API

scripts.backtest:all: npm run backtest:fx && cp trades_backtest.json trades_backtest_fx.json && npm run backtest:gold && cp trades_backtest.json trades_backtest_gold.json && node generate-report-data.js && node build-report.cjs
scripts.backtest:fx: TRADING_PAIRS=EUR_USD,GBP_USD,USD_JPY STRATEGY_MODE=combined_ny_london SESSION_WINDOW_MODE=all_windows LONDON_MONITOR_ENABLED=true LONDON_LIVE_EXECUTION_ENABLED=true LONDON_FAKE_BREAK_ALLOWED_PAIRS=EUR_USD,USD_JPY LONDON_FAKE_BREAK_ALLOWED_WEEKDAYS=Tue,Wed,Thu LONDON_FAKE_BREAK_EXCLUDED_PAIR_WEEKDAYS=EUR_USD:Thu LONDON_FAKE_BREAK_TRADE_END_UTC=9.0 LONDON_MAX_LOSSES_PER_DAY=1 LONDON_FAKE_BREAK_TARGET_MODE=asian_opposite BACKTEST_INTRABAR_MODE=tick BACKTEST_TICK_SOURCE=sqlite BACKTEST_FIXED_BALANCE_USD=1191.99 BACKTEST_START_DATE=2026-01-01 BACKTEST_END_DATE=2026-12-31 node --max-old-space-size=8192 backtest-multi.js
scripts.backtest:fx:report: npm run backtest:fx && node generate-report-data.js && node build-report.cjs
scripts.backtest:gold: TRADING_PAIRS=XAU_USD STRATEGY_MODE=ny_asian_continuation SESSION_WINDOW_MODE=all_windows NY_ASIAN_ALLOWED_SESSIONS=london_open,ny_overlap NY_ASIAN_MAX_TRADES_PER_SESSION=2 NY_ASIAN_MIN_BREAK_PIPS=100 NY_ASIAN_ENTRY_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_STOP_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_MIN_RISK_PIPS=200 NY_ASIAN_MAX_RISK_PIPS=2000 NY_ASIAN_RR_RATIO=3.0 NY_ASIAN_REQUIRE_H1_ALIGNMENT=false NY_ASIAN_TRADE_START_UTC=7 NY_ASIAN_TRADE_END_UTC=16 NY_ASIAN_FORCE_EXIT_UTC=16 NY_ASIAN_PREFER_AFTER_UTC=7 BACKTEST_SPREAD_PIPS=40 BACKTEST_SLIPPAGE_PIPS=5 BACKTEST_INTRABAR_MODE=tick BACKTEST_TICK_SOURCE=sqlite BACKTEST_FIXED_BALANCE_USD=1191.99 BACKTEST_START_DATE=2026-01-01 BACKTEST_END_DATE=2026-12-31 node --max-old-space-size=8192 backtest-multi.js
scripts.backtest:gold:report: npm run backtest:gold && node generate-report-data.js && node build-report.cjs
scripts.backtest:gold:2024: TRADING_PAIRS=XAU_USD STRATEGY_MODE=ny_asian_continuation SESSION_WINDOW_MODE=all_windows NY_ASIAN_ALLOWED_SESSIONS=london_open,ny_overlap NY_ASIAN_MAX_TRADES_PER_SESSION=2 NY_ASIAN_MIN_BREAK_PIPS=100 NY_ASIAN_ENTRY_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_STOP_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_MIN_RISK_PIPS=200 NY_ASIAN_MAX_RISK_PIPS=2000 NY_ASIAN_RR_RATIO=3.0 NY_ASIAN_REQUIRE_H1_ALIGNMENT=false NY_ASIAN_TRADE_START_UTC=7 NY_ASIAN_TRADE_END_UTC=16 NY_ASIAN_FORCE_EXIT_UTC=16 NY_ASIAN_PREFER_AFTER_UTC=7 BACKTEST_SPREAD_PIPS=40 BACKTEST_SLIPPAGE_PIPS=5 BACKTEST_FIXED_BALANCE_USD=1191.99 BACKTEST_START_DATE=2024-01-01 BACKTEST_END_DATE=2024-12-31 node --max-old-space-size=8192 backtest-multi.js
